name: UwsMbrSubjAreaBalSumLoad

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_source AS (SELECT s.TRGT_SYS_CD, s.SUBJ_AREA_NM, s.BAL_DT, s.CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD, s.ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD, s.RI_TLRNC_CD, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY s.BAL_DT ASC) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_rows FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_UWSOwner}.TBL_BAL_SUM s WHERE s.TRGT_SYS_CD='@{pipeline().parameters.Target}' AND s.SUBJ_AREA_NM='@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}'), cte_recursive AS (SELECT rn, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_AREA_NM, BAL_DT, CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD, ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD, RI_TLRNC_CD, total_rows, CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD AS svCSCurrTlrncCd, ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD AS svRRCurrTlrncCd, RI_TLRNC_CD AS svRICurrTlrncCd, CASE WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), BAL_DT, 120) <> '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'NEXT ROW' ELSE CASE WHEN (CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','NA') AND ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','NA') AND RI_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','NA')) THEN 'BAL' WHEN (CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','IN') OR ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','IN') OR RI_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','IN')) THEN 'IN' ELSE 'OUT' END END AS svTempTlrncCd, CASE WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), BAL_DT, 120) = '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'Y' ELSE CASE WHEN (CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','IN') OR ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','IN') OR RI_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','IN')) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END END AS svTempRslvIn, CASE WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), BAL_DT, 120) <> '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'NEXT ROW' ELSE CASE WHEN (CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','NA') AND ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','NA') AND RI_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','NA')) THEN 'BAL' WHEN (CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','IN') OR ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','IN') OR RI_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','IN')) THEN 'IN' ELSE 'OUT' END END AS svTempRslvIncd, 0 AS svPrevCount, 1 AS svCurrCount FROM cte_source WHERE rn=1 UNION ALL SELECT s.rn, s.TRGT_SYS_CD, s.SUBJ_AREA_NM, s.BAL_DT, s.CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD, s.ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD, s.RI_TLRNC_CD, s.total_rows, s.CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD, s.ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD, s.RI_TLRNC_CD, CASE WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), s.BAL_DT, 120) <> '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'NEXT ROW' ELSE CASE WHEN (s.CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','NA') AND s.ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','NA') AND s.RI_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','NA')) AND c.svTempTlrncCd NOT IN ('OUT','IN') THEN 'BAL' WHEN (s.CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','IN') OR s.ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','IN') OR s.RI_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','IN')) AND c.svTempTlrncCd <> 'OUT' THEN 'IN' ELSE 'OUT' END END, CASE WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), s.BAL_DT, 120) = '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN c.svTempRslvIn ELSE CASE WHEN (s.CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','IN') OR s.ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','IN') OR s.RI_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','IN')) AND c.svTempRslvIncd <> 'OUT' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END END, CASE WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), s.BAL_DT, 120) <> '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'NEXT ROW' ELSE CASE WHEN (s.CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','NA') AND s.ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','NA') AND s.RI_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','NA')) AND c.svTempRslvIncd NOT IN ('OUT','IN') THEN 'BAL' WHEN (s.CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','IN') OR s.ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','IN') OR s.RI_TLRNC_CD IN ('BAL','IN')) AND c.svTempRslvIncd <> 'OUT' THEN 'IN' ELSE 'OUT' END END, c.svCurrCount, c.svCurrCount+1 FROM cte_source s JOIN cte_recursive c ON s.rn=c.rn+1 ), final AS (SELECT TOP 1 '@{pipeline().parameters.Target}' AS TRGT_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' AS SUBJ_AREA_NM, CONVERT(DATETIME, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}',120) AS LAST_BAL_DT, c.svTempTlrncCd AS TLRNC_CD, c.svTempRslvIn AS PREV_ISSUE_CRCTD_IN, @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle} AS TRGT_RUN_CYC_NO, CONVERT(DATETIME, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}',120) AS CRT_DTM, CONVERT(DATETIME, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}',120) AS LAST_UPDT_DTM, '@{pipeline().parameters.UWSAcct}' AS USER_ID FROM cte_recursive c WHERE rn=total_rows ORDER BY rn DESC) SELECT * FROM final

Description:
*****************************************************************************************************************************************************************************

CALLED BY:   IdsMbrshpBalCntl

PROCESSING:
                  
                The Job loads the SUBJECT_AREA_BAL_SUM table after the balancing control job is done for a given Subject Area

Annotations:
Job Name: UwsMbrSubjAreaBalSumLoad
Extraction From Table Balance Summary table for a given subject area and target system and loading into the Subject Area Balance Summary table
Read all the Data from UWS TBL_BAL_SUM TBL_BAL_SUM Table; Pull records based on SOURCE AND  SUBJECT
Reference Code Mapping Data for Code SK lookups
Left Join to pull the MemberCounts 
Join Keys:
SOURCE AND SUBJECT
Defaults and Null Handling
Update then Insert the SUBJ_AREA_BAL_SUM Data.
